{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032316575797C53E047FF1F5153B51"}"},"total":232},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616961915021525784","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看的一本书，剧情和人物描写的很好。关于一些设定，像执行之龙和星辉死神，它们是不会被寰宇给秒杀的，创造是会被超级泰坦秒掉，比如凋零斯拉，执行之龙"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773464533,"group_id":"7603554621482617918","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8ICA24Anun9iahqPPmX25MbHe9XSvRpMxAaOh1fpM9Q","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1212087932302515","user_name":"喜欢花棒的高凤天"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1212087932302515","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7603554621482617918","book_info":{"abstract":"【斩神同人+我的世界+轻松愉+无女主+无尽贪婪+泰坦生物+撮合情侣】
隐逸尘手持寰宇支配之剑，击溃执行之龙后，通过空间裂缝来到斩神世界。
而后成为执行之龙与星辉死神代理人。
【执行之龙】：祂是泰坦生物的终极恐怖，祂的吐息能够改写规则，祂的存在即是末日！
【星辉死神】：祂是泰坦生物的终焉造物，祂即是万物终点，祂的长刀能斩断世间星河！
..........
大夏疆域前，隐逸尘孤身一人镇守边疆。
前方，十万神秘与奥林匹斯众神将大夏边境围得水泄不通。
宙斯：“呵呵，如今我整个奥林匹斯将大夏全境围得水泄不通，你一个人类还要螳臂挡车？”
隐逸尘：“螳臂挡车？你在自我介绍吗？”
“执行之龙，星辉死神，给我滚出来！”
.........
两只泰坦生物出现，下一秒，风云骤变，天地失色。
云巅之上，两道顶天立地的庞大生物瞬间出现。
龙息吐出，长刀斩出。
这奥林匹斯众神瞬间寂灭大半，宙斯被斩断半边身子，脸色黑如锅贴。
“我左手执行之龙，右手星辉死神。”
“连我小弟都打不过，你配让我开创造？”
“蝼蚁......”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/fd861354464b04080d28317767fc592e","author":"大爱仙尊壹号","author_id":"","book_id":"7603554621482617918","book_name":"斩神：创造起手，至高神也得跪！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1062,"name":"斩神衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1062&name=斩神衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7603554670602109502","read_count":"48135","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"319658"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"152","tags":"男频衍生,无女主,同人,搞笑轻松,斩神衍生,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9ccecd83c1a834dc513fb578cdea3a8d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779440277&x-signature=C65hDRnA0x7mc25nxZijbe4PRFc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"233577004149264","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"116"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032316575797C53E047FF1F5153B51"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_c
